reason: Successfully sent a message to the agent to open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, and retrieve the page title. The agent completed the task and the response confirms the page title is "Example Domain".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent application with agents list in sidebar and main content area.
Found the "QA-20260401-235622-4woe" agent in the sidebar - Located in the agents list with status "idle", visible in both sidebar navigation and main content area.
Clicked on the "QA-20260401-235622-4woe" agent - Agent was selected, conversation interface opened, status changed to "working", and a new session "Browser Page Title Lookup" was created.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message successfully entered into the message input field and displayed in the conversation.
Clicked Send message button - Message was sent to the agent, agent status changed to "working" with a timer showing.

Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response arrived within approximately 12 seconds. The agent executed all required browser actions: "Open Browser", "Page Snapshot", "Browser Command $ get title", and "Close Browser". All actions completed successfully with green checkmarks.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response text clearly states: "The page title is **Example Domain**. It's the standard IANA example domain page with a single 'Learn more' link." The verification succeeded as required.
